name: Taric
title: The Gem Knight
shortBio:
- The Abilities are completely different. Read the descriptions
- Can solo lane and maybe jungle

skins.name: Armor of the Fifth Age Taric
Bloodstone Taric
skins.description: Considered to be the most handsome and cunning acolyte of his Bloodstone cult, Taric seized power after the former leader took to the hunt. Now fully in control of his Bloodstone artifact, he uses his powers to maintain his youth and beauty at all costs—even if it means getting his hands a little bloody.

skins.name: Pool Party Taric
skins.description: Always on the alert, Taric will run in cinematic slow motion to save any swimmer in distress. Although, Taric has failed to save a distressing number of them.

skins.name: Taric Luminshield

chromas.name: Taric Luminshield (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2020.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2020.

skins.description: A battle cleric who has to simultaneously tank and heal for a pair of bumbling rogues, Taric Luminshield may be the only thing keeping his table from a total party wipe. In-universe he's a devout warrior of the Divine Goddess Targonius, but out of universe he'd rather be in a different campaign.

skins.name: Space Groove Taric

chromas.name: Space Groove Taric (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

skins.description: Taric always found himself wanting more out of life and dreamed of discovering what was beyond his mundane world. His wish was granted when Teemo arrived on his planet and swept him off on an adventure. He's now found a place for himself as Ornn's apprentice as he works to understand the concept of Groove.

skins.name: Classic Taric
skins.description: Taric's gem knight thematic has stood up against the test of time. The advent of Targon saw Taric evolve from a generic healer to an ex-soldier inhabiting the role of The Protector. Nevertheless, his love for beauty and his dedication to defending it remains truly, truly outrageous.

passive.name: Gemcraft
passive.description: Taric loves to socket magical gems into all of his weapons, resulting in his basic attacks dealing bonus magic damage based on his maximum Mana.

spells.name: Imbue
spells.description: Taric brings forth earthen energy to heal an ally and himself. This heal is more potent when Taric heals only himself. Additionally,Taric's basic attacks reduce Imbue's cooldown.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Taric brings forth earthen energy, restoring @HealAmount@ health to an ally and himself. If he targets himself, the heal increases by 40% restoring @HealAmountSelfTT@ health.

Taric's basic attacks reduce Imbue's cooldown by 1 second (3 seconds if attacking an enemy champion).

spells.name: Shatter
spells.description: Taric is protected by a hardening aura, increasing the Armor of himself and nearby allied champions. He may choose to splinter the enchanted rocks surrounding him to deal damage and decrease the Armor of nearby enemies at the cost of some Armor for a short time.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Passive: Taric's gemstones increase his Armor by @ArmorBonus@. Additionally, nearby allied champions gain @BonustoAllies@ Armor (@ArmorBonusCoefficient*100@% of Taric's Armor).

Active: Taric shatters his armor, dealing @TotalDamage@ magic damage to nearby enemies and reducing their Armor by @ArmorShred*-1@ for 4 seconds. Taric loses @ArmorBonus@ Armor while Shatter is on cooldown.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Dazzle
spells.description: Taric emits a brilliant ball of prismatic light from his gemmed shield, stunning his target and damaging them based on how close he is to them.
spells.dynamicDescription: <mainText>Taric fires a prismatic sphere at a target enemy, dealing between <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@</magicDamage> and <magicDamage>@TotalMaxDamageTT@ magic damage</magicDamage> and <status>Stunning</status> for between @MinStunLength@ and @MaxStunLength@ seconds. Dazzle's damage increases the closer Taric is to the target, and the stun length increases the further from the target.

spells.name: Radiance
spells.description: Taric slams his hammer into the ground to deal damage to nearby enemies. For a time after, Taric's gems radiate energy empowering Taric and his allies with bonus Attack Damage and Ability Power
spells.dynamicDescription:
Taric slams his hammer into the ground, dealing @TotalDamage@ magic damage to nearby enemies.

For the next 10 seconds, Taric's gems radiate energy, granting him @DamageIncrease@ Attack Damage and Ability Power. His nearby allies gain @AllyBonus@ Attack Damage and Ability Power.
